description: During a heavy rainstorm, the system monitors sewer levels to proactively prevent a sanitary sewer overflow (SSO).

nodes.task_description: Monitor real-time sewer levels from sensors in the collection system.

expected_outcome.value: System gathers live sewer level data.

nodes.task_description: The system detects rapidly rising levels in a specific sewer main due to rainfall inflow and infiltration.

expected_outcome.value: System generates a high-level alarm and predicts a potential overflow.

nodes.task_description: Recommend actions to mitigate the overflow, such as increasing pumping rates at a downstream lift station or diverting flow to a storage basin.

expected_outcome.value: System suggests increasing pumping rates at a specific lift station.
